title: Internal tool / back office
summary: An internal line-of-business tool: staff sign-in, schema-driven CRUD over owned tables, an append-only audit trail of who-did-what, file attachments, and feature flags for staged access. Assembles almost entirely from parts the other skeletons already use — the proof that the library compounds.
seams_the_agent_writes: the domain tables + their CRUD config
the few custom views the generated admin doesn't cover
